description: Perform a lead generation and outreach workflow in BlueMail. Identify 3 distinct authors from the Inbox and move one email from each into a new folder named 'Candidates'. Document these candidates in a CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/candidates.csv with the headers 'Name,Email,Topic', using the original subject line as the Topic. Send a personalized outreach email to each author with the subject 'Community Contribution Recognition'. Each email must include a personal salutation using the author's name and explicitly mention their original topic. Extract names from the 'From' header for all documentation and correspondence.
